title: BetterMalay Language Pack
description: A pack which improves the Malay translations for old versions of Minecraft
body:
# BetterMalay Language Pack | Pek Bahasa BetterMalay **What does this project add? / Apa yang ditambahkan dalam projek ini?**
- This pack improves the Malay translations for older versions of Minecraft
Pek ini menambahbaikkan terjemahan Bahasa Melayu dalam versi lama Minecraft **Why? / Kenapa?**
- Because ever since Ahmad Ali Karim (EmpAhmadK) became the Minecraft proofreader for Malay, many changes have been made to the translations, including some new mob name's translations!
Sebab banyak perubahan telah berlaku kepada terjemahan permainan sejak pelantikan Ahmad Ali Karim (EmpAhmadK) sebagai proofreader Minecraft untuk Bahasa Melayu, termasuk beberapa terjemahan nama baharu untuk sesetengah makhluk/mob! - Because there are many translations in old Minecraft versions that is incorrect, and doesn't follow the [Minecraft's Official Glossary](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1xxDvR2MrPUaxXwNfn-oJX-fBerEsZkfo/)
Kerana terdapat banyak terjemahan dalam versi-versi lama Minecraft yang tidak betul dan tidak mengikuti [Glosari Rasmi Minecraft](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1xxDvR2MrPUaxXwNfn-oJX-fBerEsZkfo/) --- **Available Versions / Versi Tersedia**
| Minecraft Versions | Available? | | :------------------ | :------------: | | 1.21 (Tricky Trials Update)
1.20 (Trails & Tales Update) | ✔️ | | 1.19 (Wild Update)
1.18 (Cave & Cliffs Update - Part II)
1.17 (Caves & Cliffs Update - Part I)
1.16 (Nether Update)
1.15 (Buzzy Bees Update)
1.14 (Village & Pillage Update)
1.13 (Update Aquatic) | ✔️ | | 1.12 (World of Color Update)
1.11 (Exploration Update) | ✔️ | | 1.10 (Frostburn Update)
1.9 (Combat Update) | ✔️ | | 1.8 (Bountiful Update)
1.7 (Update That Changed The World) | ✔️ | | 1.6 (Horse Update) | ✔️ | | Beta 1.7.3 | Soon!™ | ---
Want to pair this resource pack with other MCEM pack(s)?
Make sure it's in this exact order!

-> Senjata Melayu*
-> Busana Melayu*
-> BetterMalay Language Pack**
-> JawiCraft Language Pack**
-> Any pack you want to use, or, in this case, the default texture pack


* = Can be freely swapped
** = May only be swapped if you want to use the Jawi language option, since the splash text will not render correctly if not using it, especially on older versions
---
Check out other MCEM packs! / Jom tengok pek MCEM lainnya!
--- **Credits / Penghargaan**

A Malay-themed Minecraft Resource Pack Collection Project
سبواه ڤروجيک کوليکسي ڤيک سومبر ماءينکرف‌ت برتيماکن ملايو**
